subcodes.first_line: Be thou sweet as sugar and like unto honey, embodying the sweetness of the love of God and the delight of divine knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شیرین شکرین باش و مانند انگبین یعنی حلاوت محبت الله و لذت معرفت الله را
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love of God
